summary: iPhone 14/15 video player crashes on iOS 17.4+ in TOI app v8.3.1
description:
Reproducible: open any article with embedded video on iPhone 14 running iOS 17.4.1, TOI app v8.3.1. Video player loads briefly then app force-closes within ~5 seconds.

Root cause: AVPlayerLayer disposal during interrupted prefetch. Fix is in v8.4 release branch (PR #2241 merged 30 April).
